title: AI-Driven System for Sustainable Urban Development
summary: Researchers unveil a multi-agent recommendation system integrating urban theory for sustainable city development.

title: AI Rollout Outpaces Risk Controls, Warns Gallagher
summary: Businesses increase AI training and roles, but risk controls lag, raising concerns about responsible AI implementation.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the urgent need for robust AI governance to prevent unintended consequences.

title: JSE Lists AI-Focused Actively Managed ETF

title: Tech Layoffs Surge Amid AI Shift

charlotte_impact: Illustrates the disruptive impact of AI on the job market, requiring workforce adaptation.

title: False Consensus Skews AI Against Vulnerable Groups
